full_text:
Chen Wu (Zilie) 陳武 (子烈)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Wu (陳武), styledZilie (子烈), was born in Songzi of Longjiang. Served Sun Ce as Commandant. Surrounded at Hefei and fought to his death. Chen Wu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Chen Wu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
